title: dipterocarpus guiso
intro: Dipterocarpus guiso, also known as the Guiso tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical forests of the Philippines. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, and its leaves and bark possess medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dipterocarpus guiso include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. Dipterocarpus guiso is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and its extracts are also used in traditional herbal remedies, although further scientific research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
